description_long: This object is a pair of classic Santa hats, each featuring a soft, plush red crown with a slightly slouched, floppy shape. The base of each hat is encircled by a thick, white, textured band that mimics faux fur, providing a cozy and festive appearance. At the tip of each hat, a round, white pom-pom is attached, adding a playful and traditional touch. The hats have a slightly wrinkled and natural fabric look, suggesting they are made from a soft, flexible material. The red and white color scheme is iconic and instantly recognizable as holiday-themed. These hats are typically worn during winter festivities and Christmas celebrations in urban environments.
description: A pair of classic Santa hats with red, slouched crowns, white faux fur bands, and white pom-poms at the tips.
description_view_0: Two Santa hats are shown from a slightly elevated angle, highlighting the red crowns and white pom-poms, with the white bands partially visible.
description_view_1: The hats are viewed from the front, clearly displaying the white bands and pom-poms facing forward.
description_view_2: A side view reveals the slouched shape of the crowns and the alignment of the pom-poms, with the white bands visible at the base.
description_view_3: The hats are seen from the back, showing mostly the red crowns and the rear curve of the white bands, with pom-poms less visible.
attribute_brim_style: wide, plush, and upturned faux fur band
